name: ModifyNews
description: Change data of a news on the computer.
postconditions: The system shall notify the successful amendment of news.
The system shall notify the successful amendment of news.
The Operator Agency cancels the operation.
Interruption of the connection to the server ETOUR.
steps: Activate the editing functionality of a news.
View all news in a form.
Select a news from the list and submit the form.
Load the data of news and displays them in a form for editing.
Change data in the form and submit.
Check the modified information and asks for confirmation of the transaction. Where the data is invalid or insufficient, the system activates the use case Errored.
Confirm the operation of changing the data news.
